pairs.expected_answer: The conditions when entering the MDI/MDA mode will be those of the interruption point; i.e. the CNC maintains the history of active G and M functions, feedrate, spindle speed, tool and other commands that were programmed[cite: 225, 226].

questions.es: ¿Cuáles son las condiciones activas al entrar al modo MDI/MDA desde un programa interrumpido?
questions.en: What are the active conditions when entering MDI/MDA mode from an interrupted program?

pairs.expected_answer: The function G83 is used for the deep-hole drilling canned cycle with constant peck on an M model [cite: 409][cite_start], and G161 is used for multiple machining in a rectangular pattern[cite: 456].

questions.es: Si se requiere ejecutar un ciclo fijo de taladrado profundo con paso continuo en una fresadora y aplicar un mecanizado múltiple en un patrón rectangular, ¿qué funciones G deben utilizarse?
questions.en: If it is required to execute a deep-hole drilling canned cycle with a constant peck on a milling model and apply multiple machining in a rectangular pattern, which G functions must be used?

pairs.expected_answer: If the feedrate is not defined, the probing movement will be made at the feedrate set by the OEM[cite: 135]. [cite_start]If the validation message is not displayed, pressing the START key executes the probing movement again[cite: 145].

questions.es: En la calibración semiautomática, si no se define el avance en el primer paso, ¿a qué avance se realizará el movimiento de palpado y qué ocurre si se pulsa la tecla START cuando el mensaje de validación no está en pantalla?
questions.en: In semi-automatic calibration, if the feedrate is not defined in the first step, what feedrate will the probing movement use, and what happens if the START key is pressed while the validation message is not displayed?

pairs.expected_answer: Change the modifiable attribute of the selected files[cite: 324]. [cite_start]This attribute is used to protect the files so they cannot be modified from the EDISIMU mode, indicated by the letter -M- in the attributes column[cite: 324, 325].

questions.es: ¿Cómo se puede proteger un archivo para evitar que sea modificado desde el modo EDISIMU?
questions.en: How can a file be protected to prevent it from being modified from the EDISIMU mode?

pairs.expected_answer: The instruction #SERVO OFF activates the open loop mode [cite: 557][cite_start], and the instruction #MASTER selects the master spindle of the channel[cite: 531].

questions.es: ¿Qué instrucción de alto nivel activa el modo de bucle abierto y cuál selecciona el husillo maestro del canal?
questions.en: Which high level language instruction activates the open loop mode and which one selects the master spindle of the channel?

pairs.expected_answer: The HELP key is used to display CNC help[cite: 5].

questions.es: ¿Para qué sirve la tecla HELP en el monitor y teclado?
questions.en: What does the HELP key do on the monitor and keyboard?

pairs.expected_answer: In theoretical travel simulation, the spindle control is not sent to the PLC[cite: 184]. [cite_start]In main plane simulation, the spindle control is sent to the PLC[cite: 187].

questions.es: Durante la ejecución simulada, ¿se envía el control del husillo al PLC en la simulación de trayectoria teórica y en el plano principal?
questions.en: During simulated execution, is the spindle control sent to the PLC in theoretical travel simulation and in main plane simulation?

pairs.expected_answer: The function M04 starts the spindle counterclockwise[cite: 354, 355].

questions.es: ¿Qué función auxiliar se usa para arrancar el husillo en sentido antihorario?
questions.en: What auxiliary function is used to start the spindle counterclockwise?

pairs.expected_answer: The attribute -M- indicates that the program may be modified[cite: 324]. [cite_start]The attribute -H- indicates that the program will be hidden and not visible[cite: 326].

questions.es: En el modo utilidades, ¿qué indican los atributos -M- y -H- en la columna de atributos de un archivo?
questions.en: In Utilities mode, what do the attributes -M- and -H- indicate in the attributes column for a file?

pairs.expected_answer: The G04 function represents a dwell[cite: 365].

questions.es: ¿Qué significa la función preparatoria G04?
questions.en: What does the preparatory function G04 mean?

pairs.expected_answer: The instruction #KINORG transforms the current part zero considering the position of the table kinematics[cite: 530]. [cite_start]The instruction #KIN ID selects a kinematics[cite: 529].

questions.es: ¿Qué instrucción transforma el cero pieza actual considerando la posición de la cinemática de la mesa y cuál selecciona una cinemática?
questions.en: Which instruction transforms the current part zero considering the position of the table kinematics, and which one selects a kinematics?

pairs.expected_answer: Tool inspection may be accessed from the vertical softkey menu only when the execution of the program has been interrupted using the STOP key[cite: 222].

questions.es: ¿Cuándo se puede acceder a la inspección de herramienta desde el menú vertical de softkeys?
questions.en: When can tool inspection be accessed from the vertical softkey menu?

pairs.expected_answer: When pressing the rapid key while moving an axis, the CNC applies the rapid feedrate[cite: 21].

questions.es: ¿Qué sucede al pulsar la tecla de rápido mientras se mueve un eje desde el panel jog?
questions.en: What happens when the rapid key is pressed while moving an axis from the JOG panel?

pairs.expected_answer: In the automatic block search, there is no need to select the stop block, as the CNC runs the search up to the block where the program was interrupted[cite: 204, 205]. [cite_start]If the first block is not selected, the block search starts at the beginning of the program[cite: 206].

questions.es: En la búsqueda de bloque automática, ¿es necesario seleccionar el bloque de parada y qué ocurre si no se selecciona el primer bloque para iniciar la búsqueda?
questions.en: In automatic block search, is it necessary to select the stop block, and what happens if the first block is not selected as the start of the search?

pairs.expected_answer: The FUP function returns the integer plus one, or the same number if it is already an integer[cite: 601, 602].

questions.es: ¿Qué función matemática devuelve el número entero más uno?
questions.en: What mathematical function returns the integer plus one?

pairs.expected_answer: In manual calibration, the milling model is used to calibrate the length of the endmills and the offsets of the lathe tools[cite: 117, 118]. [cite_start]The lathe model plane is used to calibrate the offset of any tool[cite: 119].

questions.es: En la calibración manual de herramientas, ¿cuál es la diferencia de parámetros entre el modelo de fresadora y el modelo de torno en plano?
questions.en: In manual tool calibration, what is the parameter difference between the milling model and the lathe model plane?

pairs.expected_answer: The fixture table stores the clamp offsets for each axis, and it may be set directly in the table, from the PLC, or via part-program using variables[cite: 310].

questions.es: ¿Qué almacena la tabla de utillajes y cómo pueden configurarse sus valores?
questions.en: What does the fixture table store and how can its values be set?

pairs.expected_answer: No, the syntax check is not available for programs written in 8055 CNC language[cite: 252, 253].

questions.es: ¿Se puede usar el icono de análisis de sintaxis para revisar programas escritos en lenguaje CNC 8055?
questions.en: Can the syntax check icon be used to analyze programs written in 8055 CNC language?

pairs.expected_answer: The function G100 is used for probing until making contact[cite: 428, 429]. [cite_start]The function G103 is used for probing until not making contact[cite: 430].

questions.es: ¿Qué código G se utiliza para el palpado hasta hacer contacto y cuál para el palpado hasta no hacer contacto?
questions.en: Which G code is used for probing until making contact and which one for probing until not making contact?

pairs.expected_answer: Programming Q10.013 means that no machining takes place at points 10, 11, 12 and 13[cite: 488].

questions.es: ¿Qué significa programar el parámetro Q10.013 durante un mecanizado múltiple?
questions.en: What does programming the parameter Q10.013 mean during multiple machining?
